name: meshflow
description: Production-safe multi-agent orchestration with governance built in. Run governed workflows, enforce tool call policy, maintain tamper-evident audit chains, and apply HIPAA/SOX/GDPR/ISO 27001 compliance — zero configuration.
author: Anteneh Tessema <anteneh@yayasystems.com>

tools.name: meshflow_run
tools.description: Run any task through a governed multi-agent pipeline. Every run gets: SHA-256 tamper-evident audit chain, hard cost cap, HIPAA/SOX/GDPR/ISO 27001 compliance, Zero Trust agent identity, and durable crash recovery.

parameters.task: The task to execute through the governed agent pipeline.
parameters.policy: Governance policy: standard (default), strict, hipaa, sox, gdpr, dev, sandbox.
parameters.budget_usd: Hard cost cap in USD. Execution stops before reaching this limit.

tools.name: meshflow_run_agent
tools.description: Call a specific registered agent by name. Use after registering agents with MCPServer.register_agent().

parameters.task: The task to pass to the agent.

tools.name: meshflow_approve_hitl
tools.description: Approve or reject a paused human-in-the-loop checkpoint. Use when meshflow_run returns status='paused'.

parameters.run_id: The run_id returned by the paused workflow.
parameters.approved: true to approve, false to reject.
parameters.comment: Optional comment for the audit trail.
